frames.goal: Demonstrate the positive accept/resume/apply path with a real judged hypothesis.

manifest.assumption: The goal can be solved by recursively selecting, testing, and updating explicit assumptions.
manifest.why_selected: User requested recursive self-argument rather than a one-shot proposal queue.
manifest.expected_effect: Produce an auditable stack of hypothesis frames and child verification tasks.
manifest.verification_plan: Every open child frame must define the observation needed to update its parent.
manifest.rollback_condition: Reject a child hypothesis if its verifier fails or creates unacceptable regression risk.

frames.goal: Test whether this candidate should be promoted.
frames.hypothesis: Use an intent-aware math/science bypass: route mathematics into formal vs research-bridge prompts, and science into mechanism vs decision prompts, instead of one generic hygiene bypass.
frames.expected_observation: recover concrete research bridge/action-plan answers on math/science rows where the old bypass was too formal; preserve strict formal/mechanistic answers for ordinary math/science problems

return_update.on_success: candidate can advance to acceptance/application or close the parent gap
return_update.on_failure: classify residual and generate a narrower child frame
